focus_points.label: Concrete quality bar and what 'good' means
focus_points.reason: What 'good' looks like in his day-to-day brand design work, so feedback isn’t abstract or subjective.

focus_points.label: Whether prior feedback changed his behavior
focus_points.reason: Manager wants to know if earlier feedback translated into observable behavior changes or stayed at the level of general advice.

focus_points.label: How he defines good work right now
focus_points.reason: What he thinks is expected of a junior brand designer today, so you can calibrate expectations together.

focus_points.label: Growth blocks and the next practice focus
focus_points.reason: Where he feels blocked in growth, and which near-term development focus he can practice immediately.
